title: The Tea Party Opens
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Nami, Reiju, Pudding, Big Mom Pirates, Big Mom, Sanji as The wedding ceremony and tea party begin, with Big Mom’s enemies preparing to strike.
scene: The wedding begins under Big Mom’s watch, with hidden assassination plans moving beneath the ceremony.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you just going to abandon Sanji like this?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oi! How in the world am I supposed to wake him up?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I mean, he did run himself almost to death around that forest...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At this point, I doubt he'd wake up for anything except food.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oi! Does anyone have any meat?! We're running out of time here!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Damn it, the CERE- Monty's started, Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: This song will be your requirement,

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: sanji, my dear! I... I'm so happy!O

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn it! No! Keep your wits about you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I space out here, I'm gonna die!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I fell for you! And it hurt!)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But now I've made it to my Virgin Road! ♥

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Don't let go of my hand!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You're somethin', aren't ya, streusel! Well done!)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am not worthy of thy praise, mama!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't believe we're going to exchange our vows ♥ with that wonderful cake as our altar! ♥

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ehehe! You're even more wonderful, you know :)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My, pudding, you look so pretty! Reminds me of when I was younger, to be honest.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And how many years ago was that, I wonder...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: More years than you'll continue to live, if you keep that up.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Make sure you enjoy this, guests! It'll all be over in the blink of an eye.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My apologies, but you'll be disappearing today, Vin- smokes!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: and enjoy the wedding proceedings today.

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Tea Party Begins storyline with 50 dialogue beats. The wedding and tea party begin, placing Sanji, Pudding, Big Mom, Bege and the Straw Hats on a collision course.
